---
include-in-header:
  - text: |
      <style>
      #title-block-header .title{
          text-align:center;
          font-size:3rem;
          font-style:italic;
          font-family:Georgia, "Times New Roman", serif;
          color:#000;
      }
      </style>
---

# Myathropa florea

::: {.species-common-names}
Yellow-haired Sun Fly •	Batmanschiefmecke •	Totenkopfschwebfliege •	Éristale des fleurs •	Mosca-zangão amarela
:::

![](batman.jpeg){.species-photo}

## Activity period

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false

source(here::here("Atlas", "code", "0_Initialisation.R"))
source(here::here("Atlas", "code", "2_LoadBorders.R"))
source(here::here("Atlas", "code", "3_LoadData.R"))
source(here::here("Atlas", "code", "6_PresenceMois.R"))

plot_phenologie(DB3, "Myathropa florea")
```

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="50%"}
GRAPH 2
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
GRAPH 2
:::

:::



## Description

## Habitat

### Immature

### Mature


## Distribution

### National

### Global

MAP



```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
message("here: ", here::here())
message("wd: ", getwd())
message("target file: ", here::here("Atlas", "code", "0_Initialisation.R"))
message("file exists? ", file.exists(here::here("Atlas", "code", "0_Initialisation.R")))
source(here::here("Atlas", "code", "0_Initialisation.R"))
```
